label: Scenario Analysis
description: Spot and volatility shock grid with preset scenarios and P&L impact per position.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=["options-trading"]. 0.3: availableOn=["options"]. 0.4: No any types or @ts-ignore in widget file. 0.5: Widget file has no lib/mocks/ imports; delegates entirely to ScenarioTab which imports SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX, SCENARIO_PRESETS etc. from mocks internally — panel-level mock usage logged as L1 open finding. 0.6: N/A — options-data-context has no isLoading field; data is synchronous mock. 0.7: ScenarioTab always renders a full grid (SPOT_STEPS and VOL_STEPS are static constants); no data-empty path. 0.8: N/A — context throws if Provider missing (WidgetErrorBoundary handles this); no async error path in ScenarioTab. 0.9: No dead code in widget file.

1.1.note: Widget reads assetClass, asset, tradFiAsset via useOptionsData() and passes to ScenarioTab; no inline fetch. However, ScenarioTab re-derives spotPrice and baseIv from SPOT_PRICES/IV_INDEX mocks internally rather than reading them from context (context exposes spotPrice). This is a panel-level

1.2.note: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists via organizationIds; scenario grid asset selection is not org-filtered (asset is user-selected). 1.4: clientIds not applicable — scenario analysis is asset/expiry-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to scenario display. 1.6: Empty organizationIds → full watchlist set returned. 1.7: SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts in a future refactor.

l1.notes: 1.1: Widget reads assetClass, asset, tradFiAsset via useOptionsData() and passes to ScenarioTab; no inline fetch. However, ScenarioTab re-derives spotPrice and baseIv from SPOT_PRICES/IV_INDEX mocks internally rather than reading them from context (context exposes spotPrice). This is a panel-level 1.1 concern, not a widget-file violation. Open finding for ScenarioTab to accept spotPrice/baseIv as props from context. 1.2: options-data-context.tsx calls useGlobalScope() (line 130). 1.3: Org filter scopes watchlists via organizationIds; scenario grid asset selection is not org-filtered (asset is user-selected). 1.4: clientIds not applicable — scenario analysis is asset/expiry-scoped. 1.5: Strategy filter not applicable to scenario display. 1.6: Empty organizationIds → full watchlist set returned. 1.7: SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts in a future refactor.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

knownIssues: ScenarioTab (scenario-tab.tsx) re-derives spotPrice and baseIv from lib/mocks/ constants instead of accepting them as props from context; context already exposes spotPrice.
Reference data (SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS) live in lib/mocks/fixtures — should move to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.

findings.description: 1.1 panel-level — ScenarioTab reads SPOT_PRICES[asset] and IV_INDEX[asset] directly from mocks even though options-data-context exposes spotPrice. Widget passes assetClass/asset/tradFiAsset but ScenarioTab ignores context spotPrice. Should be refactored to accept spotPrice and baseIv as props (from context) to ensure single data path.
1.7 — SCENARIO_PRESETS, SPOT_STEPS, VOL_STEPS, SPOT_PRICES, IV_INDEX all live in lib/mocks/fixtures/options-futures-mock. Should move config constants to lib/config/services/options.config.ts.
